nasb.text: The counsel of the Lord stands forever, The plans of His heart from generation to generation.

esv.text: The counsel of the Lord stands forever, the plans of his heart to all generations.

cnv.text: 耶和華的謀略永遠立定， 他心中的計劃萬代長存。

ccb.text: 祂的计划永不落空， 祂的旨意万代长存。

csbs.text: 耶和华的谋略确立，直到永远； 他心里的意念存到万代。
